---
name: marp-slide-theme-selection
description: "Marp Theme Selection Guide"
version: 1.0.0
author: Alexa
---
     1|# Marp Theme Selection Guide
     2|
     3|Select the optimal theme from all 7 types according to your use case.
     4|
     5|## Theme List and Use Cases
     6|
     7|### 1. Default (theme-default.css / template-basic.md)
     8|
     9|**Features**: Refined design, decorative lines, footer bar **Colors**: Beige background + navy text + blue headings **Use for**: General seminars, training, presentations **Atmosphere**: Calm, elegant, sophisticated
    10|
    11|### 2. Simple & Minimal (theme-minimal.css / template-minimal.md)
    12|
    13|**Features**: Minimal decoration, wide margins, light fonts **Colors**: White background + gray text + black headings **Use for**: Content-focused presentations, academic talks, quiet impression **Atmosphere**: Clean, simple, refined
    14|
    15|### 3. Colorful & Pop (theme-colorful.css / template-colorful.md)
    16|
    17|**Features**: Gradients, bright colors, bold emphasis **Colors**: Pink background + multi-color accents **Use for**: Youth-oriented, events, creative projects **Atmosphere**: Fun, energetic, vibrant
    18|
    19|### 4. Dark Mode (theme-dark.css / template-dark.md)
    20|
    21|**Features**: Dark background, glow effects, eye-friendly **Colors**: Black background + cyan/purple accents **Use for**: Tech presentations, evening talks, modern impression **Atmosphere**: Cool, modern, futuristic
    22|
    23|### 5. Gradient Background (theme-gradient.css / template-gradient.md)
    24|
    25|**Features**: Different gradient per slide, white text, shadow effects **Colors**: Purple~pink~blue~green gradients **Use for**: Visual-focused, creative presentations, impressive talks **Atmosphere**: Vivid, dynamic, impressive
    26|
    27|### 6. Tech/Code (theme-tech.css / template-tech.md)
    28|
    29|**Features**: GitHub-style design, code fonts, Markdown-style symbols **Colors**: Black background + blue/green accents **Use for**: Programming courses, tech meetups, developer-focused **Atmosphere**: Technical, developer-oriented, GitHub-style
    30|
    31|### 7. Business-like (theme-business.css / template-business.md)
    32|
    33|**Features**: Corporate presentation style, table support, top border **Colors**: White background + dark navy headings + blue accents **Use for**: Business presentations, proposals, reports **Atmosphere**: Formal, trustworthy, professional
    34|
    35|## Theme Selection Decision Flow
    36|
    37|### Step 1: Filter by Use Case
    38|
    39|**Technical/Developer-oriented** → Tech/Code **Business/Corporate** → Business-like **Creative/Event** → Colorful & Pop or Gradient Background **Academic/Simple** → Simple & Minimal **General/Unsure** → Default
    40|
    41|### Step 2: Choose by Atmosphere
    42|
    43|**Bright and fun** → Colorful & Pop, Gradient Background **Calm and elegant** → Default, Business-like **Cool and modern** → Dark Mode, Tech **Simple and clean** → Simple & Minimal
    44|
    45|### Step 3: Choose by Background Color
    46|
    47|**Bright background**: Simple & Minimal, Default, Business-like, Colorful & Pop **Dark background**: Dark Mode, Tech **Gradient**: Gradient Background
    48|
    49|## Inferring from User Requests
    50|
    51|### "Make it look good" / "Make it cool"
    52|
    53|→ Decide based on content:
    54|
    55|- Business content: Business-like
    56|- Technical content: Tech or Dark Mode
    57|- General: Default
    58|- Creative: Gradient Background
    59|
    60|### "Keep it simple" / "Make it readable"
    61|
    62|→ Simple & Minimal or Default
    63|
    64|### "Make it flashy" / "Make it stand out"
    65|
    66|→ Colorful & Pop or Gradient Background
    67|
    68|### "Technical" / "Programming"
    69|
    70|→ Tech/Code
    71|
    72|### "Business" / "Corporate" / "Proposal"
    73|
    74|→ Business-like
    75|
    76|### "Dark" / "Black background" / "Eye-friendly"
    77|
    78|→ Dark Mode or Tech
    79|
    80|## When to Use Default Theme
    81|
    82|Use the default theme in these cases:
    83|
    84|- User hasn't specified a particular theme
    85|- Use case is not clear
    86|- Only vague instructions like "make it look good"
    87|- Training/seminar purposes
    88|
    89|## Suggesting Multiple Themes
    90|
    91|Suggest 2-3 themes concisely in these cases:
    92|
    93|- User asks "Which one is best?"
    94|- Content allows for multiple options
    95|- First-time user seems uncertain
    96|
    97|Example suggestion: "I recommend the following themes for this presentation:
    98|
    99|1. **Business-like**: Formal impression
   100|2. **Default**: Well-balanced all-purpose Which would you prefer?"
   101|
